text:
TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: This field is only populated if the Medicare-defined Post Threshold Cost Shares do not apply. Plans that 
use a coinsurance percentage rather than a co-payment amount will not have a value in this field; 
reference instead the corresponding co-payment variable called (POST_OOPT_COINS_PCT). The 
catastrophic coverage phase is also referred to as the post-out-of-pocket threshold phase for the Part 
D benefit. 

The CCW
